# Drawer

Slides a Vaul-backed bottom sheet up from the screen edge with drag-to-dismiss.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/drawer
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="drawer"
  example={0}
  code={`<Drawer.Root>
  <Drawer.Trigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Open filters</Button>
  </Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Content>
    <Drawer.Header>
      <Drawer.Title>Filters</Drawer.Title>
      <Drawer.Description>Narrow the device list.</Drawer.Description>
    </Drawer.Header>
    <Drawer.Footer>
      <Drawer.Close asChild><Button>Apply</Button></Drawer.Close>
    </Drawer.Footer>
  </Drawer.Content>
</Drawer.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Drawer.Root>
  <Drawer.Trigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Open filters</Button>
  </Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Content>
    <Drawer.Header>
      <Drawer.Title>Filters</Drawer.Title>
      <Drawer.Description>Narrow the device list.</Drawer.Description>
    </Drawer.Header>
    <Drawer.Footer>
      <Drawer.Close asChild>
        <Button>Apply</Button>
      </Drawer.Close>
    </Drawer.Footer>
  </Drawer.Content>
</Drawer.Root>
```

## Props

| Prop         | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                         |
| ------------ | --------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `showHandle` | `boolean` | No       | -       | Hide the drag handle (kept by default: it signals drag-to-dismiss). |
